headline: Marriott, Other Hotel Stocks Have Tumbled During the Iran War. Why They Could Rebound.
summary: Marriott, Hyatt, and Hilton shares have fallen as travel stocks sold off during the Iran conflict, but limited Middle East exposure could help the hotel sector rebound.
